description: USCann appears to provide an authentication-related web API hosted at `apibeta.uscann.net`, with endpoints for user registration, login token issuance, email-token validation, and password reset flows. Public documentation for this API is sparse; the confirmed machine-readable description comes from the mirrored OpenAPI document.
summary: uscann.net exposes one documented HTTP API surface: a public USCann Authentication API with an OpenAPI spec published via APIs.guru and no authentication scheme declared in the spec.
